en: These are the generations of the sons of Noah, Shem, Ham, and Japheth. Sons were born to them after the flood.
zh: 以下是挪亞的兒子閃、含、雅弗的後代。洪水以後，他們都生了兒子。

en: The sons of Japheth: Gomer, Magog, Madai, Javan, Tubal, Meshech, and Tiras.
zh: 雅弗的兒子是歌篾、瑪各、瑪代、雅完、土巴、米設、提拉。

en: The sons of Gomer: Ashkenaz, Riphath, and Togarmah.
zh: 歌篾的兒子是亞實基拿、利法、陀迦瑪。

en: The sons of Javan: Elishah, Tarshish, Kittim, and Dodanim.
zh: 雅完的兒子是以利沙、他施，基提人和多單人。

en: From these the coastland peoples spread in their lands, each with his own language, by their clans, in their nations.
zh: 這些人的後裔分散居住在沿海的土地和島嶼上。各人隨著自己的方言、宗族，住在自己的國土中。

en: The sons of Ham: Cush, Egypt, Put, and Canaan.
zh: 含的兒子是古實、埃及、弗和迦南。

en: The sons of Cush: Seba, Havilah, Sabtah, Raamah, and Sabteca. The sons of Raamah: Sheba and Dedan.
zh: 古實的兒子是西巴、哈腓拉、撒弗他、拉瑪和撒弗提迦。拉瑪的兒子是示巴和底但。

en: Cush fathered Nimrod; he was the first on earth to be a mighty man.
zh: 古實又生寧錄；寧錄是世上第一位英雄。

en: He was a mighty hunter before the LORD. Therefore it is said, "Like Nimrod a mighty hunter before the LORD."
zh: 他在耶和華面前是個英勇的獵人；因此有句俗語說：“就像寧錄一樣，在耶和華面前是個英勇的獵人。”

en: The beginning of his kingdom was Babel, Erech, Accad, and Calneh, in the land of Shinar.
zh: 他開始建國是在示拿地的巴別、以力、亞甲和甲尼。

en: From that land he went into Assyria and built Nineveh, Rehoboth-Ir, Calah, and
zh: 他從那地出來，到亞述去，建造了尼尼微、利河伯城、迦拉，

en: Resen between Nineveh and Calah; that is the great city.
zh: 和尼尼微與迦拉之間的利鮮，就是那大城。

en: Egypt fathered Ludim, Anamim, Lehabim, Naphtuhim,
zh: 埃及生路低人，亞拿米人、利哈比人、拿弗土希人、

en: Pathrusim, Casluhim (from whom the Philistines came), and Caphtorim.
zh: 帕斯魯細人、迦斯路希人和迦斐託人；從迦斐託出來的有非利士人。

en: Canaan fathered Sidon his firstborn and Heth,
zh: 迦南生了長子西頓，又生赫，

en: and the Jebusites, the Amorites, the Girgashites,
zh: 以及耶布斯人、亞摩利人、革迦撒人、

en: the Hivites, the Arkites, the Sinites,
zh: 希未人、亞基人、西尼人、

en: the Arvadites, the Zemarites, and the Hamathites. Afterward the clans of the Canaanites dispersed.
zh: 亞瓦底人、洗瑪利人、哈馬人，後來迦南人的宗族分散了。

en: And the territory of the Canaanites extended from Sidon in the direction of Gerar as far as Gaza, and in the direction of Sodom, Gomorrah, Admah, and Zeboiim, as far as Lasha.
zh: 迦南人的境界是從西頓伸向基拉耳，直到迦薩；又伸向所多瑪、蛾摩拉、押瑪、洗扁，直到拉沙。

en: These are the sons of Ham, by their clans, their languages, their lands, and their nations.
zh: 這些人都是含的子孫，隨著自己的宗族、方言，住在自己的國土中。

en: To Shem also, the father of all the children of Eber, the elder brother of Japheth, children were born.
zh: 雅弗的哥哥閃，就是希伯所有子孫的祖宗，他也生了孩子。

en: The sons of Shem: Elam, Asshur, Arpachshad, Lud, and Aram.
zh: 閃的兒子是以攔、亞述、亞法撒、路德和亞蘭。

en: The sons of Aram: Uz, Hul, Gether, and Mash.
zh: 亞蘭的兒子是烏斯、戶勒、基帖、瑪施。

en: Arpachshad fathered Shelah; and Shelah fathered Eber.
zh: 亞法撒生沙拉，沙拉生希伯。

en: To Eber were born two sons: the name of the one was Peleg, for in his days the earth was divided, and his brother's name was Joktan.
zh: 希伯生了兩個兒子，一個名叫法勒，因為他在世的時候，世人就分散了；法勒的兄弟名叫約坍。

en: Joktan fathered Almodad, Sheleph, Hazarmaveth, Jerah,
zh: 約坍生亞摩答、沙列、哈薩瑪非、耶拉、

en: Hadoram, Uzal, Diklah,
zh: 哈多蘭、烏薩、德拉、

en: Obal, Abimael, Sheba,
zh: 俄巴路、亞比瑪利、示巴、

en: Ophir, Havilah, and Jobab; all these were the sons of Joktan.
zh: 阿斐、哈腓拉、約巴，這些人都是約坍的兒子。

en: The territory in which they lived extended from Mesha in the direction of Sephar to the hill country of the east.
zh: 他們居住的地方，是從米沙伸向西發，直到東邊的山地。

en: These are the sons of Shem, by their clans, their languages, their lands, and their nations.
zh: 這都是閃的子孫，隨著自己的宗族、方言，住在自己的國土中。

en: These are the clans of the sons of Noah, according to their genealogies, in their nations, and from these the nations spread abroad on the earth after the flood.
zh: 這些宗族都是挪亞的子孫，按著他們的族系住在列國中。洪水以後，地上的列國都是從這些宗族分出來的。
